body_txt: If you are facing a giant monster in a video game with a penchant for eating your character whole , the most effective (if not only) way to deal damage to them is almost always to chuck a bomb or other explosive into their wide open mouth as they try to take a bite out of you. Especially if their method of eating you involves sucking you up from across the room with their Vacuum Mouth . Alternatively, they may not be trying to eat you but instead use their Breath Weapon on you, which requires them to first take a deep inhale before spewing out flames/poison/whatever. Either way, the monster will eat the bomb, it will explode inside them, and they will either take hefty damage or be killed outright (and if the rating of the game allows it, turned into Ludicrous Gibs ). Naturally, it never occurs to them to just keep their mouth shut and kill you some other way (or in the case of the Breath Weapon , inhale through their nose instead). A Sub-Trope of both Stuff Blowing Up and Attack the Mouth . Compare Eat the Bomb (when the bomb doesn't kill the Big Eater ), Too Spicy for Yog-Sothoth , Assimilation Backfire , Kill It Through Its Stomach , Insert Grenade Here (blowing up vehicles in a similar fashion). Contrast Mooks Ate My Equipment (where it likes eating your stuff) and Targeting the Exhaust System (where you attack from where it voids its waste).
